title: Chapter 107
content:
Chapter 107: Crazy

Denzel stood proudly. At this point, he was standing, well, like a superhero. His hands on his wrists, proudly ushering her gaze to his monstrous light. And Sarah, well she simply remained below him.

At that moment, she could only just stop all that ransacked through her mind, drinking in the view of Denzel’s length.

So, Denzel proudly watched was on her knees, saying nothing. And obviously, it couldn’t be denied that she was impressed.

She couldn’t hide it. It was all over her face when she saw him like that.

"So, what do you think?" he asked.

’what do I think? You’re a beast. Look at how big that dick is...no...is it even qualified to be called a dick? It should be referred to as a weapon at this point. No wonder he’s a virgin, if he used this dick on anyone he’d annihilate the person.’

She was still mumbling to herself, still trying to understand how the hell his cock could be that big.

She then instantly shaked her head, trying to drag herself back to reality, and on straightening her composure, she replied to Denzel.

"It’s just normal, you know."

"Normal, really?" Denzel said.

’You lying whore...I saw the fear in your eyes when you saw me set my dragon free...But maybe, I can utilize her lie too.’

"Hehe...I didn’t expect you to say that...well...if it’s so normal."

Then he added.

"How about we take a little test drive with it?"

"A test drive?" she asked.

"Yeah. If it’s normal, then I’m sure you can wrap your hands around it. Why don’t you try? If two of your hands can meet while they’re wrapped around this ’normal dick’, I’ll concede defeat."

She squinted her eyes a bit, her body almost trembling just from the thought of it.

She didn’t understand why, but it seemed like her cheeks were beginning to become a bit flushed.

And so Denzel remained confident in his challenge.

’Wrap my hands around his cock? My hands have never been as small as that of a normal woman, but can my fingers really met around him?’ She cautioned herself, understanding that her chances of winning had drastically fallen now.

And so, taking a sigh, With all the self-control she could muster, she managed to keep herself in check as she slowly flickered her gaze from his throbbing veined cock back to his gaze.

"Alright then." she said.

"I accept."

Taking a steady breath, she brought both hands forward. Then, carefully, she wrapped them around his huge cock.

At first, she had expected it to be an exaggeration. Surely it couldn’t be as large as she thought.

But the moment she tried to fit both hands around it, her eyes widened in utter disbelief.

A sharp gasp escaped her lips.

"I... it can’t... it can’t reach."

Her hands weren’t merely failing to meet. They weren’t even close.

There was still a considerable gap between them as his veins bumped hotter, hardening his dick by the moment, just by her touch.

That was just how enormous Denzel’s length was.

For several moments, she remained frozen in place, completely stunned.

She stared down at it, unable to process what she was seeing.

Somehow, she even found herself unable to remove her hands from it.

She simply remained there, holding it, staring at it in silence.

Finally, after taking a soft breath, she let go.

"You...win" she began, shaking her head slightly before chuckling.

"Your dick... it’s amazing."

Her eyes drifted back toward him.

"How can you actually be that big?"

Denzel shrugged.

"I don’t know. It’s... genetics, isn’t it?"

"Gene-what?"

She blinked at him in confusion.

The word clearly meant nothing to her.

’Ugh, again.’ Denzel thought inwardly.

’I keep using words that aren’t from this time.’

"Never mind." he said, waving it off.

"Anyway, since it’s pretty obvious you can’t deny it anymore, I’m humongous."

A grin spread across his face.

"Which means you have to fulfill our agreement. Since I won the bet, I get to touch you."

Immediately, she hesitated.

’Wouldn’t that be cheating on Antonia?’

The thought surfaced almost instantly.

Then she thought about it again.

’No, no. It’s just a game. We only made a bet, right? I could just take the drink, take the whole jug, and leave. That was always an option.’

And honestly, it was a very reasonable option. Yet despite that, curiosity continued to creep into her mind.

She remembered what his touch had felt like before. The memory lingered.

She wanted to know, or perhaps more accurately, she wanted to feel what he was truly capable of.

After several seconds, she lowered her head slightly and gave a reluctant nod.

"Alright then."

She glanced away.

"But you don’t have much time. Our 7 minutes will be over soon."

Denzel’s grin widened.

"Then you’d better hurry up."

As he spoke, he helped her rise to her feet and as she did, he grabbed onto her flared skirt, raising it up as he his hand journeyed to her fattened ass.

His other fingers slid from her neck, trailing downward toward her swollen breasts.

And as he moved closer, he lifted his tongue and then, he recommended his suckling, once more beginning his gulps of her huge breasts.

She could feel the movement coursing through her.

Finally, Denzel pulled her closer and turned her around. Holding her tightly against him, he lowered his voice and said.

"What does Antona usually put in your ass? Little fingers, right? Well, what do you think is going to happen when I put every bit of my dick in you then?"

She stared at him for a moment, caught off guard, before stuttering slightly and flicking her eyes over her shoulder to look back at him.

At this point, even though part of her wanted to protest, her desire for pleasure was overwhelming everything else.

So, after a brief hesitation, she mumbled,

"Are you crazy? It won’t fit."

A smile spread across Denzel’s face.

"Well, there’s only one way to find out."

Even as she heard those words, she realized that she wanted to find out as well.

And with that, Denzel guided his humongous cock towards her asshole.

"Ohh!" Sarah exclaimed even louder.
